## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on potential partnership between Doppel and GrowthX for content creation and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a sophisticated AI-powered content creation process with human expertise oversight](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Doppel is considering GrowthX against alternatives like building in-house or using other AI tools (e.g., AirOps)](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Key differentiators: GrowthX's workflow quality, publishing automation, and analytics integration](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Pricing: $30K strategy sprint + $15K/mo retainer; some flexibility on payment terms](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI workflows with deep context integration (knowledge base, custom instructions)](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Human experts (managing editor, content manager) oversee and refine AI outputs](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Aims for high-quality, brand-aligned content without requiring extensive client review](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Can integrate client's proprietary data into content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)

### Content Publishing and Management

  - [GrowthX handles end-to-end process, including CMS posting (initially manual, potential for automation)](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Streamlined review process crucial for efficiency; multiple reviewers can slow down publication](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Offers content performance tracking via Looker dashboards and Scrunch for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

### SEO and Performance Metrics

  - [Uses Google Search Console data for organic search performance](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Scrunch for LLM content performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Can customize analytics reporting based on client needs](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [Emphasizes long-term investment (6+ months) for meaningful organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

### Competitive Considerations

  - [GrowthX works with multiple clients in similar spaces (e.g., CodeRabbit, Spectre Ops)](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [Manages potential conflicts by not staffing same team members on competing accounts](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
  - [Doppel identified ZeroFox as a major competitor in their space](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)

### Pricing and ROI Discussion

  - [Standard pricing: $30K strategy sprint + $15K/month retainer](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [Some flexibility on payment terms; potential for $12K/month with annual commitment](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [Compared to in-house costs or traditional agency pricing ($2,000-$2,500 per article)](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1870.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Doppel to consider GrowthX offering against alternatives (in-house, other AI tools)](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Potential for Doppel to try building custom solution first before committing to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Doppel to internal discussion on budget, ROI expectations, and timeline for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Follow-up on any remaining questions or concerns about GrowthX's offering](https://fathom.video/share/gjjJKubX7o_jM7qefgCsezYmeu2ehtxD?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)
